final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial street portrait photograph of a young woman in 90s Hong Kong.

Style/medium: needs a retro film aesthetic — exact film stock and grain treatment are yours
Composition: must include the subject leaning against a neon sign
Subject: must include a young woman wearing a denim jacket
Scene/backdrop: must include a 90s Hong Kong street at night with neon signage
Lighting/mood: needs a hazy night atmosphere with cinematic warmth — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm nostalgic direction — exact color grading is yours
Materials/textures: needs film grain texture — exact grain density and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
